name: Tortellini and Spinach Stew
recipeIngredient: 4 medium tomatoes, peeled and chopped (or 8 plum tomatoes)
1 cup chicken broth, or beef or vegetable broth
2 tablespoons fresh basil, minced, or 1 teaspoon dried basil
1/3 cup Asiago cheese, grated or Parmesan cheese, grated
Freshly ground black pepper for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook tortellini according to package directions.
2. Remove stems from spinach leaves and set aside.
3. Seed and chop tomatoes and set aside.
4. Heat olive oil in a large deep skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
6. Add broth and bring to a gentle boil, uncovered, for 5 minutes.
7. Stir in chopped spinach, tomatoes, and basil; continue cooking until the spinach wilts.
8. Drain cooked tortellini and add it to the skillet.
9. Cook for another minute or until heated through.
10. Sprinkle with grated Asiago cheese or Parmesan cheese and serve with freshly ground black pepper.
